top_signals.title: South Africa’s Kganyago Warns Inflation Expectations Are Rising
top_signals.summary: South Africa’s central bank governor said policymakers are seeing early signs of second-round inflation effects as underlying price pressures build, emphasizing the need to act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin ETFs shed a record $6.4B in 30 days amid crypto winter chill
top_signals.summary: US-listed spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds saw their biggest 30-day net outflow since launching in 2024, coming as Bitcoin fell 17% over the past month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: “You’re dead” — Europe’s SpaceX fights back against Musk prophecy
top_signals.summary: Ariane 6 rocket programme gets help from Jeff Bezos as it seeks to emerge from US rival’s shadow
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
